evie_note: Core first. Engine second. Clean form, honest report, no random hero workouts.

orders.title: Main PT Alpha
orders.details: Monday core + endurance. Clean form. No hero nonsense.

orders.title: Daily Minimum
orders.details: Water first, small mobility, easy movement, no-zero-day maintenance.

orders.title: Main PT Bravo
orders.details: Wednesday strength chassis + core. Leave two reps in reserve.

orders.title: Recovery Mobility + Check-In
orders.details: Thursday recovery, stiffness control, pain and energy check.

orders.title: Main PT Charlie
orders.details: Friday endurance + movement discipline. Steady engine work.

weekly_structure: Monday: Main PT Alpha - Core + Endurance
Tuesday: Daily Minimum - Beloved Creature Maintenance
Wednesday: Main PT Bravo - Strength Chassis + Core
Friday: Main PT Charlie - Endurance + Movement Discipline
Saturday: Optional light walk, technique, stretch, or mobility
Sunday: Rest, review, plan next week
daily_minimum: Hip hinges or chair sit-to-stand: 1 set x 8
Dead bug, heel taps, or brace breathing: 1 set x 6
sunday_review: Set Monday, Wednesday, and Friday training times

exercise_library.name: Dead bug
exercise_library.details: Lie on your back, brace gently, and move the opposite arm and leg slowly without arching the lower back.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop for sharp back pain, dizziness, nerve symptoms, or unsafe pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Brace gently. Keep ribs down. Extend one heel and the opposite arm only as far as the back stays quiet. Return with control.
exercise_library.warning: Stop if the lower back arches or sharp pain appears.
exercise_library.progression: Extend the legs farther or add reps.
exercise_library.regression: Move arms only, legs only, or use heel taps.

exercise_library.name: Bird dog
exercise_library.details: Controlled opposite arm and leg reach for core stability, hips, and back-safe coordination.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop if kneeling or spinal extension causes unsafe pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Start on hands and knees. Brace gently. Reach opposite arm and leg long, pause, then return without twisting.
exercise_library.warning: Avoid dumping into the low back or rotating the hips open.
exercise_library.regression: Move one limb at a time.

exercise_library.name: Glute bridge
exercise_library.details: Hip and posterior-chain rebuild movement that supports posture and lower-back protection.
exercise_library.how_to: Lie on your back, feet planted. Brace lightly, squeeze glutes, lift hips until body forms a straight line, then lower.
exercise_library.progression: Add a pause at the top.

exercise_library.name: Sit-to-stand
exercise_library.details: Chair-based squat pattern for legs, hips, balance, and functional strength.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop for sharp knee, hip, or back pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Sit tall on a stable chair. Stand with control, keep knees tracking over feet, then sit back down softly.
exercise_library.warning: Do not collapse the knees inward.
exercise_library.progression: Lower the chair height or add a slow tempo.

exercise_library.name: Incline push-up
exercise_library.details: Upper-body push rebuild with scalable incline.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop for sharp shoulder, wrist, or chest pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Hands on a stable incline. Keep a straight line from head to heel, lower under control, press back up.
exercise_library.warning: Keep shoulders controlled and ribs from flaring.
exercise_library.regression: Use a wall or higher support.

exercise_library.name: Band row
exercise_library.details: Pulling strength for posture, shoulders, and upper-back balance.
exercise_library.contraindications: Use a safe anchor and stop for sharp shoulder pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Anchor band safely. Pull elbows back, squeeze shoulder blades gently, then return under control.
exercise_library.progression: Use a stronger band or slower tempo.

exercise_library.name: Farmer carry
exercise_library.details: Loaded carry for grip, trunk stiffness, posture, and practical work capacity.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop if load changes gait or causes unsafe back pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Hold weight at sides, stand tall, walk steadily, and keep breathing.
exercise_library.regression: Use lighter objects or shorter rounds.

exercise_library.name: Side plank from knees
exercise_library.details: Side-core stability drill with reduced load.
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop for shoulder or sharp back pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Support on forearm and knees. Lift hips, keep a straight line from shoulder to knee, breathe.
exercise_library.progression: Longer holds or full side plank.
exercise_library.regression: Standing side brace against a wall.

exercise_library.name: Easy walk
exercise_library.contraindications: Stop for chest symptoms, dizziness, unsafe gait, or sharp pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Walk at a pace that keeps breathing controlled. Keep posture tall and stride comfortable.
exercise_library.warning: No running until the walking base earns it.

exercise_library.name: Light intervals
exercise_library.details: One minute brisk, two minutes easy, repeated for controlled endurance work.
exercise_library.contraindications: Do not use if pain, breath, or gait is unstable.
exercise_library.how_to: Warm up first. Alternate one minute brisk with two minutes easy for five rounds.
exercise_library.progression: Add one round after recovery is consistent.

exercise_library.name: Hamstring stretch
exercise_library.details: Gentle hamstring mobility for forward-fold progress and lower-body comfort.
exercise_library.contraindications: Avoid nerve pain, numbness, or aggressive pulling.
exercise_library.how_to: Keep the knee soft, hinge gently, and breathe into a mild stretch.

exercise_library.name: Cat-cow
exercise_library.details: Gentle spinal motion for stiffness control.
exercise_library.how_to: On hands and knees, move slowly between gentle rounding and gentle extension.

exercise_library.name: Hip flexor stretch
exercise_library.details: Recovery stretch for hips and posture.
exercise_library.contraindications: Use support if balance or knees complain.
exercise_library.how_to: Use a supported lunge or standing version. Tuck pelvis gently and breathe.
exercise_library.warning: Do not force the low back into extension.

exercise_library.name: Pallof press
exercise_library.details: Anti-rotation core drill for trunk control and back protection.
exercise_library.contraindications: Use a safe anchor and stop for sharp pain.
exercise_library.how_to: Stand side-on to band anchor. Press band straight out, resist rotation, then return.

challenges.name: One-Mile Trial
challenges.requirements: Walk or walk/jog one mile and report time, breathing, legs, and back.
challenges.safety_notes: Unlock after walking base is consistent.

safety_rules: Follow any VA, doctor, or physical therapist restrictions.
Stop the session if pain becomes sharp, unsafe, dizzying, chest-related, nerve-like, or medically wrong.
No aggressive back bends or forced back extension.
No running until walking base is adequate.
Discomfort is allowed. Stupidity is not.

exercise_groups.name: Main PT Alpha
exercise_groups.notes: Primary rebuild day. Core first, engine second.

exercise_groups.name: Daily Minimum
exercise_groups.notes: No-zero-days. Completion matters more than intensity.

exercise_groups.name: Main PT Bravo
exercise_groups.notes: Strengthen legs, hips, back, posture, and brace. Leave two reps in reserve.

items.notes: Light row with controlled shoulder blades.

exercise_groups.name: Recovery Mobility
exercise_groups.notes: Recovery, range of motion, stiffness control, and readiness check.

exercise_groups.name: Main PT Charlie
exercise_groups.notes: Build the engine without turning it into a death march.

exercise_groups.name: Saturday Optional
exercise_groups.notes: Useful, not punitive. Light technique, stretch, mobility, or rest.
